name: Tomato, Lime & Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot, sauté onions and garlic in oil until softened.
2. Add the chiles, cumin, and oregano; sauté for a few more minutes.
3. Add tomatoes and sprinkle with a little salt. Cover the pot and cook gently until the tomatoes begin to release their juices.
4. Stir occasionally. Add stock and simmer, covered, for 15 minutes.
5. Add lime juice and check the seasoning.
6. Serve topped with crumbled tortilla chips (optional) and garnish with cilantro.
